title: ErrorMessage Property, Spel Class
description: Returns the error message from the last command executed. Not available at design time.
notes:
The error message returned is a SPEL+ error message. For details, see your SPEL+ Language manual.

Data Type

String
see_also:
ErrorNumber Property

Reply Property

ErrorMessage Property Example

Dim lastErr As Integer

Dim lastErrMsg As String

lastErr = m_spel.ErrorNumber

lastErrMsg = m_spel.ErrorMessage
examples:
Dim lastErr As Integer
Dim lastErrMsg As String

lastErr = m_spel.ErrorNumber
lastErrMsg = m_spel.ErrorMessage
